title: MxBB (Modded Barebones)
description:
THE MINECRAFT TRAILER PACK -
[M X BB]

Always wanted your game to look like Mojang's Official Trailers?

Now you can! Thanks to @Ashmough and @BlackElphnt.

Even though there is already a trailer pack out;
unlike the theirs, ours is Forge x Fabric!
body:
![MXBB RDSGN](https://i.imgur.com/DL62Z9f.jpeg)

Special thanks to @RoboPants and @Ashmough.
------------------------------------------------
V2.0.1 Out Now!

DOWNLOAD AND ENJOY THE FUN!

THANK YOU FOR 1500+ DOWNLOADS <3

FOLLOW & SAVE FOR FOR NOTIS ON UPDATES!
------------------------------------------------
Please be sure to join the Discord to see future updates 
on MxBB and report bugs in the issue-tracker channel 
under mxbb using the link below, thanks!

[![Discord Server](https://assets-global.website-files.com/6257adef93867e50d84d30e2/636e0b52aa9e99b832574a53_full_logo_blurple_RGB.png)](https://discord.gg/S8RrgJ7ctF)
